new_classes.label_en: Stone Fruit Mash (plum, pear, or cherry)
new_classes.definition_en: Fermented mash made exclusively from plums, pears, or cherries, used as the feedstock for the distillation of plum, pear, or cherry brandy (Pflaumenwasser, Birnenwasser, Kirschwasser) classified under CN 2208 90 33 and 2208 90 38.

new_classes.label_en: Stone Fruit Mash Fermentation and Distillation Process
new_classes.definition_en: Process of fermenting and then distilling a mash made exclusively from plums, pears, or cherries to produce stone-fruit brandy (Pflaumenwasser, Birnenwasser, Kirschwasser) as classified under CN subheadings 2208 90 33 and 2208 90 38.

new_classes.label_en: Plum, Pear or Cherry Brandy in containers ≤ 2 L (CN 2208 90 33)
new_classes.label_de: Pflaumen-, Birnen- oder Kirschbranntwein in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 L (KN 2208 90 33)
new_classes.definition_en: Alcoholic beverage produced exclusively by distillation of fermented mash of plums, pears, or cherries, presented in containers of a nominal capacity not exceeding 2 litres, classified under CN 2208 90 33.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three core distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 90 33: (1) the product is a spirituous beverage (subClassOf SpiritousBeverage); (2) it is produced exclusively by distillation of fermented stone-fruit mash (plum, pear, cherry), modelled via producedBy StoneFruitMashFermentationDistillationProcess, which in turn has part StoneFruitMash; (3) it is presented in containers ≤ 2 L (has part SmallContainer). The legal note also covers CN 2208 90 38 (containers > 2 L), which is the sibling subheading and is modelled in a separate axiom call. The note references definitional notes for the terms 'plums' and 'cherries' (cross-reference to note "E"), which cannot be resolved from the provided legal text and TBox, so those sub-definitional nuances are not captured — minor coverage gap. No minimum alcoholic strength is stated in the provided legal note for this subheading specifically, so the MinAlcohol qualities are not asserted here.
